hero.label: Custoza, Verona — Italy
hero.title: Il Metrone
hero.subtitle: A countryside retreat nestled in the rolling hills of Bianco di Custoza wine country, minutes from Verona and Lake Garda.
features.0.title: Among the vineyards
features.0.text: Endless rows of Garganega and Trebbiano stretch to the horizon, in one of Italy's oldest wine regions.
features.1.title: Verona & Lake Garda
features.1.text: 20 minutes from Verona's Arena, 10 from Lake Garda. The perfect base for every exploration.
features.2.title: Living history
features.2.text: The Tower of Custoza, the battlefields of the Risorgimento, the chime of country bells. History lives here.
intro.label: Welcome
intro.title: An authentic pause in the Veronese hills
intro.p1: Il Metrone is a family home carefully reimagined as an elegant, welcoming retreat for travelers in search of stillness, beauty and roots. The restored rooms, the tended grounds and the view over the vineyards create an atmosphere all their own.
intro.p2: Whether a romantic escape, a family holiday or a food-and-wine journey, here you'll find your own time — slow, deep, Italian.
property.label: The property
property.title: Rooms & spaces
property.subtitle: Every corner tells a story of careful restoration and contemporary taste.
property.rooms.title: The bedrooms
property.rooms.text: Bright rooms with exposed beams, linen bedding, king-size beds and views over the vineyards. En-suite bathrooms in local Custoza stone.
property.living.title: Living & kitchen
property.living.text: A fully equipped kitchen, a large convivial table, a winter fireplace and a shaded summer terrace.
property.garden.title: Garden & pool
property.garden.text: A landscaped garden with centuries-old olive trees, a heated pool and quiet reading corners outdoors.
amenities.label: Amenities
amenities.title: Everything you need
surroundings.label: Custoza & around
surroundings.title: A whole world within reach
surroundings.subtitle: Il Metrone's location is its best-kept secret.
surroundings.verona.title: Verona
surroundings.verona.text: Just 20 minutes from the Arena, Piazza Bra, Castelvecchio and Juliet's balcony.
surroundings.garda.title: Lake Garda
surroundings.garda.text: The shores of Peschiera and Lazise lie 10 minutes away. Beaches, boats, theme parks.
surroundings.wine.title: Bianco di Custoza wine route
surroundings.wine.text: Historic cellars, tastings and olive groves just steps from the house.
surroundings.history.title: Risorgimento memorials
surroundings.history.text: The Memorial and the Tower of Custoza, keepers of 1848 and 1866 memories.
story.label: Our story
story.title: From family home to soulful retreat
story.p1: Il Metrone was born in the heart of the Custoza countryside, where our family has lived for generations. The name recalls the ancient agricultural unit of measure — a tribute to the rural roots of this land.
story.p2: After years of careful restoration that respected every original stone, we opened the house to guests to share what we love: slow family meals, the scent of must in autumn, summer evenings under the pergola.
gallery.label: Gallery
gallery.title: A glimpse of Il Metrone
